title: schefflera oxyphylla var. siamensis
intro: Schefflera oxyphylla var. siamensis is a variety of the Schefflera plant species, commonly known as the Siam Gold or Umbrella Plant, native to Thailand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Thai medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The leaves and roots of the Schefflera oxyphylla var. siamensis plant are rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
